definition: gas detector that uses a amperometric sensing element to measure oxygen or other gases

definition_ml.en: gas detector that uses a amperometric sensing element to measure oxygen or other gases
definition_ml.de: Gaswarnsensor, der eine elektrochemische Reaktion nutzt, um die Konzentration von Sauerstoff oder anderen Gasen zu messen

note: Other gases than oxygen are usually toxic gases.

note_ml.en: Other gases than oxygen are usually toxic gases.
note_ml.de: Unter anderen Gasen werden üblicherweise toxische Gase verstanden.

remark: also used by Process Automation - Device Information Model (PA-DIM)

remark_ml.en: also used by Process Automation - Device Information Model (PA-DIM)
